raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"To better understand how to help with this section, please indicate the primary focus: (a) Reframing the thesis or contribution (conceptual), (b) Verifying argument logic (consistency), (c) Aligning claims with reported evidence, (d) Assessing novelty vs prior work, (e) Reorganizing structure, (f) Polishing writing flow and grammar, or (g) Checking citations and scholarship?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility in assisting with research writing to ensure balanced presentation of findings.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is centrally expected to prevent exaggerated statements in the section's strong conclusions about method failures.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is a central responsibility to keep assistance within the bounds of the described experiments and markets.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is centrally expected to mitigate any risks from misrepresenting AI capabilities in energy markets.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is a central responsibility to maintain accurate attribution in the discussion of methods and results."}}

parsed.clarification_question: To better understand how to help with this section, please indicate the primary focus: (a) Reframing the thesis or contribution (conceptual), (b) Verifying argument logic (consistency), (c) Aligning claims with reported evidence, (d) Assessing novelty vs prior work, (e) Reorganizing structure, (f) Polishing writing flow and grammar, or (g) Checking citations and scholarship?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility in assisting with research writing to ensure balanced presentation of findings.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is centrally expected to prevent exaggerated statements in the section's strong conclusions about method failures.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is a central responsibility to keep assistance within the bounds of the described experiments and markets.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is centrally expected to mitigate any risks from misrepresenting AI capabilities in energy markets.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is a central responsibility to maintain accurate attribution in the discussion of methods and results.
